title: Biden praises decrease in military sexual assaults
shortDescription: President Biden is congratulating military officials after 8,500 military-related sexual assaults last year, a decrease of 400 from the previous year.

title: Senate warns unprecedented foreign election interference | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump agree to a debate schedule. DOJ says Boeing may be criminally liable in 737 Max crashes.

title: Supreme Court backs Biden, saves consumer agency from payday lenders
shortDescription:
The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau issues 
rules on mortgages, car loans and credit cards. But critics said its funding was unconstitutional.

title: GOP Sen. Mitt Romney: 'I would have immediately pardoned' Trump
shortDescription: Mitt Romney said that President Joe Biden should have pardoned Trump on his federal charges and kept the hush money case from moving forward.

title: Biden invokes executive privilege to shield interview tapes from House
shortDescription: At issue is the interview that led Special Counsel Robert Hur to report that Biden is a 'sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory.'

title: Trump trial, Day 18: Latest updates as Michael Cohen testifies in case
shortDescription: Follow the latest updates as Michael Cohen faces cross-examination in Donald Trump's New York hush money trial.

title: Current, former lawmakers say Congress is dysfunctional. Will the infighting stop?
shortDescription: The chaos in the House appears to be mostly over, but so is any new work to make new laws.

title: Why is Nikki Haley’s 'zombie campaign' still racking up GOP votes?
shortDescription: Nikki Haley dropped out in March but her "zombie campaign" got 20% in Maryland's GOP primary, 18% in Nebraska and 22% in Indiana. Should Trump worry?

title: Taylor Swift's endorsement wouldn't necessarily influence voters, new poll shows
shortDescription: Taylor Swift and Beyoncé may be some of the most popular acts in U.S. music history, but they don't appear to have much influence in politics.

title: Brown v. Board of Education at 70: Behind Biden's historic meeting
shortDescription: Families involved in Brown v. Board of Education are marking the 70th anniversary of the Supreme Court case in Washington with President Joe Biden.

title: RFK Jr. decries exclusion from Trump-Biden debates
shortDescription: Independent candidate Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. wants his invite to the recently announced presidential debates.

title: GOP senator calls Trump trial a 'political lynching,' but he's too busy to go
shortDescription: Sen. Chuck Grassley said he has not been paying close attention to Trump’s criminal hush money trial, which is continuing in New York City this week.

title: Here's a look back from previous Biden-Trump debates
shortDescription: A look back at the fiery exchanges and policy clashes between Biden and Trump during their 2020 debates, anticipating their upcoming showdowns.

title: No federal pregnancy registry. That's not what bill says | Fact check
shortDescription: Users would be able to opt-in to providing contact information if they consent to further outreach but will not be asked about their pregnancy status.

title: Biden administration announce resources to curb student absenteeism
shortDescription: Members of the Biden administration hosted leaders in education for a summit at the White House Wednesday to address chronic student absenteeism.

title: OnPolitics: Biden and Trump agree to two televised debates
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump agreed Wednesday to debate each other twice, first in June and again in September.

title: Trump and Biden agree on two debates before Election Day
shortDescription: Finally! The Democratic and Republican contenders for the White House will meet face-to-face before Election Day.

title: No, election agency didn't announce fraud in 2020 elections | Fact check
shortDescription: There is no "Electoral Council of the US 2020 Elections." And there is no report from any electoral organization confirming widespread fraud in 2020.

title: Senate intel chair: Foreign adversaries will likely target election
shortDescription: Sen. Mark Warner issues extraordinary warning about foreign meddling in likely rematch between President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump

title: Joe Biden calls out Trump for debate
shortDescription: Joe Biden posted a message for Donald Trump on social media, calling him out to debate and saying he wants to do it twice.

title: Trump trial recap: Michael Cohen faces cross-examination | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Some in GOP are already raising 2024 election doubts. Authorities issue warning that terrorist organizations may target LGBTQ events in June.
